sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking on the red block on the right panel again
# to see if it moves the red block further up
print("Clicking on red block on right panel again (row 19, col 48)...")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 48}])
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")

# Check left panel
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nLeft panel (rows 18-45, cols 6-25):")
for i in range(18, 45):
    print(f"  {i}: {ascii_lines[i][6:26]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
